## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the patterns in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, credentials, or `.env*` files.
- [ ] If this changes the database schema, I have updated the migration scripts in `scripts/`.
- [ ] If this adds a new environment variable, I have updated `.env.example`.
